case_title: MICHAEL MENASTER RESPONDENT VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR REHEARING FILE BY RESPONDENT MICHAEL MENASTER SEND TO PRO TEM JEAN C. GASKILL

DECLARATION OF MARY ELLEN O'BRIEN IN SUPPORT OF INFORMAL BRIEF

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MENASTER, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,028.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
PETITION FOR REHEARING IS DENIED WITH PREJUDICE.
